arabic_text: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ﴿١﴾ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ﴿٢﴾ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ﴿٣﴾ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ ﴿٤﴾
alt_text: Sura al-Ikhlas (Q112) four verses with curved red arrows showing the chiastic pairing of verses 1↔4 and 2↔3.
notes: Sura al-Ikhlas chiastic structure: 1-4 pair (Ahad ↔ no kufuw ahad) and 2-3 pair (Samad ↔ neither begot nor begotten).
